tools.name: chp_analyze
tools.description: Run full CHP analysis on the codebase to detect violations and enforce traffic laws

rules.description: Specific rules to check (optional - checks all if not provided)

tools.name: chp_check
tools.description: Check specific files or rules against CHP traffic laws

tools.name: chp_create_law
tools.description: Create a new CHP traffic law with verification and guidance

description.description: Description of what the law enforces

hooks.description: Git hooks to attach (pre-commit, pre-push, etc.)

tools.name: chp_validate
tools.description: Validate CHP configuration and law definitions

law.description: Specific law to validate (validates all if not provided)

resources.name: CHP Documentation
resources.description: Context files for CHP laws and guidance
